summary: Manage write intents, proposal capsules, compose merge plans, steward apply, and inspect the local write-broker registry.

positional.name: action
positional.summary: register | decision | status | release | cleanup | proposal | compose | steward

options.summary: Run the command against a specific repository root.
Task ID to register or release.
TTL lease duration in seconds for registering write intent.
Path to PatchProposal JSON payload. Repeatable for compose / steward.
Proposal id for compose / steward or proposal show / validate.
Path to MergePlan JSON payload for steward plan / apply.
Scoped file-write target allowed for steward apply. Repeatable.
Output path for steward apply evidence JSON.
Path to broker proposal store JSON.

examples: node atm.mjs broker register --task TASK-GOV-0100 --intent-file intent.json --json
node atm.mjs broker proposal create --proposal-file proposal.json --json
node atm.mjs broker proposal show proposal-123 --json
node atm.mjs broker proposal validate proposal-123 --json
node atm.mjs broker compose --proposal-file proposal-a.json --proposal-file proposal-b.json --json
node atm.mjs broker compose --store .atm/runtime/broker-proposals.json --proposal-id proposal-a --proposal-id proposal-b --json
node atm.mjs broker steward plan --merge-plan-file merge-plan.json --proposal-file proposal.json --scope-file src/target.ts --json
node atm.mjs broker steward apply --merge-plan-file merge-plan.json --proposal-file proposal.json --scope-file src/target.ts --evidence-out steward-evidence.json --json
